---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for VibeMind
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What's frustrating or missing?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why the proposed solution is better.

## Which Space?

- [ ] Ideas (bubbles, ideas, linking)
- [ ] Coding (code generation, preview)
- [ ] Desktop (automation, screenshots)
- [ ] Voice (speech recognition, intent classification)
- [ ] Electron UI (3D rendering, navigation)
- [ ] New Space
- [ ] Core / Infrastructure

## Additional Context

Mockups, examples, references, or other context.
